headline: Invesco Mortgage Capital Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital (NYSE:IVR) reported a first-quarter 2026 book value decline and negative economic return as interest-rate volatility increased and agency mortgage spreads moved wider, while management emphasized a more constructive backdrop for agency mortgages early in the second quarter.
